name: Lucius Oriflamme
alt_names: ルキウス・オリフラム
description:
__Race:__ Vampire
__Occupation:__ Grand Duke
__Partner:__ Jeanne

He is a Vampire of noble birth born to inherit the title of Grand Duke, Luca is close to The Queen, though he is still too young to accept the role himself, thus allowing his uncle, Lord Ruthven, to act on his behalf.
